fileInput.supportedFormats: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, AVIF, BMP, TIFF, SVG

miniatureOptions.processDisabledTooltip: Add an output step to your pipeline before processing images

pipelineEditor.emptyState: No steps yet. Click the button below to add one.
pipelineEditor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
pipelineEditor.missingOutputTooltip: Your pipeline needs an output step — add one to enable image processing

stepSearch.exclusionNotice: Some steps are hidden because they are already in the pipeline.

stepConfig.noOptions: This step has no configurable options.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Upscaling factor (2×, 3×, or 4×). The model natively upscales 4×; lower values apply a post-resize.

denoise_enabled.title: Denoise
denoise_enabled.description: Apply denoising to reduce noise and compression artifacts. May soften fine details.

preset.title: Preset Resolution
preset.description: Select a common resolution preset, or choose 'Custom' to set your own width and height.

width.title: Width
width.description: Target width in pixels (used when preset is 'Custom').

height.title: Height
height.description: Target height in pixels (used when preset is 'Custom').

mode.title: Resize Mode
mode.description: 'Fit' — resize to fit within the target dimensions, preserving aspect ratio. 'Fill' — resize to cover the target dimensions, cropping if needed. 'Stretch' — resize to exactly the target dimensions, ignoring aspect ratio.

settingsDialog.title: Settings
settingsDialog.hfTokenInfo: Configuring a token enables faster downloads from Hugging Face and allows access to gated models (like BRIA RMBG-1.4). Your token is stored locally and sent securely to the backend for model downloads only.

queue.pipelineDisabledTooltip: Pipeline editing is disabled while images are being processed
